Title: The Road to El Dorado
Director: Bibo Bergeron, Don Paul, Jeffrey Katzenberg
Writer: Ted Elliott, Terry Rossio, Karey Kirkpatrick
Actors: Kevin Kline, Kenneth Branagh, Rosie Perez
Plot: The story is about two swindlers who get their hands on a map to the fabled city of gold, El Dorado, while pulling off some sort of scam. Their plan goes bad and the rogues end up lost at sea after several misfortunes. Oddly enough, they end up on the shores of El Dorado, and are worshipped by the natives for their foreign appearances.
